title: Pipe chart fits the window and ends sit on the pipe end
description:
The Pipe chart no longer needs a scrollbar: it scales to the panel height so the full run (From → To, marks, labels) stays visible at any window size. Chainage stays proportional along the shaft.

End-of-run marks and the playhead now sit on the true pipe end (0–100% along the shaft) instead of stopping slightly short of the bottom/top. Video near the start or end snaps the playhead to the structure end.

Who is affected: PipeShare Pipe chart on BASE after deploy; SaaS after Push from releases.
changeLog: Pipe chart fills the panel height — no inner scrollbar.
Track height follows available window space; proportions stay by chainage %.
End marks and labels use full 0–100% shaft (no 1.5–98.5 inset).
Playhead snaps to pipe ends near video start/end.
